{{Infobox character
| name = First Patriarch
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[First Patriarch]] of the [[Arelius family]] could watch over descendants from another continent.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|There is a statue of the [[First Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] has a marble containing a vision from the [[Arelius family]]'s [[First Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
